3165690.name: Fences 6
3165690.description:
Customize your Windows® 10/11 desktop with Fences 6, the ultimate tool for organizing files, folders, and applications. Fences helps you streamline your workflow, reduce clutter, and create a desktop that’s both personal and productive.

Organize your desktop by grouping files, folders, and icons into customizable shaded areas—or go further with Tabs, letting you stack multiple Fence groups on top of each other for a modern, streamlined workflow. With Windows key + Space, you can use Peek to access your fences instantly on top of open windows, keeping your content just a shortcut away.

Fences 6 also introduces Icon Tint, a brand-new way to personalize your desktop by applying a uniform color expression to all your icons, helping you reduce distractions and better match your style. The new color picker tool makes it easy to sample hues directly from your wallpaper for a seamless look.

Top New Features in Fences 6

  • Tabs – stack Fence groups on top of each other for a modern workflow.

  • Icon Tint – apply a uniform color expression to all desktop icons to personalize your desktop and reduce distractions.

  • New Color Picker Tool – easily choose colors from your wallpaper for perfect coordination.

  • Folder Portal Navigation Overhaul – redesigned for a more natural file-browsing workflow.

  • Quality-of-Life Enhancements – numerous small improvements across the entire Fences experience.
3165690.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 德语, 日语, 韩语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 繁体中文
